# AvökatFinder Portugal
> The English-language directory of lawyers and law firms in Portugal for expats, foreign nationals and international businesses.

## Main Pages
- https://portugal.avokatfinder.com/: Home — find an English-speaking lawyer in Portugal
- https://portugal.avokatfinder.com/lawyers/: Directory of verified law firms and lawyers in Portugal
- https://portugal.avokatfinder.com/glossary/: Legal glossary — plain-English definitions of Portugal legal terms
- https://portugal.avokatfinder.com/blog/: Expat legal guides and property law articles for Portugal
- https://portugal.avokatfinder.com/about/: About AvökatFinder Portugal
- https://portugal.avokatfinder.com/contact/: Contact us

## Site Info
- Language: English
- Audience: Expats, foreign nationals, international property buyers and businesses in Portugal
- Content: Law firm directory, legal glossary, expat legal guides
- Last updated: 2026-04-30
- Sitemap: https://portugal.avokatfinder.com/sitemap.xml
